## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or use case this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that would help clarify the request.
